sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(90) — McCloud River and tributaries (Shasta and Siskiyou Cos.)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated 06/01/2026)
sources.quotedText: (90) McCloud River and tributaries (Shasta and Siskiyou Cos.). (A) Moosehead Creek and all tributaries. Closed to all fishing all year. (B) Edson Creek. Closed to all fishing all year. (C) Swamp Creek and all tributaries. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout. (D) Sheepheaven Creek. Closed to all fishing all year. (E) Bull Creek and tributaries. Closed to all fishing all year. (F) Dry Creek south of upper McCloud River. Closed to all fishing all year. (G) McCloud River from McCloud Dam downstream to confluence of Ladybug Creek. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only Artificial lures may be used. 2 trout. Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout. (H) McCloud River from confluence of Ladybug Creek downstream to Shasta Lake. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout.

sources.title: McCloud River Redband Trout — California Department of Fish and Wildlife
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 266985, "McCloud River", Stream, CA, Shasta Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":266985,"gaz_name":"McCloud River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Shasta","objectid_1":1391287,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13614777.9574, 4978498.5196 → 40.77016°N, 122.30363°W). Corrects the file's prior coordinates (-122.0804, 41.1350), which were roughly 44 km northeast of the confirmed GNIS mouth point and appear to have been a rough midpoint guess along the river rather than a GNIS-sourced value; also confirmed against Wikipedia's infobox mouth coordinate (40.77028°N, 122.30361°W) and GNIS ID 266985.

groups.humanSummary: McCloud River from McCloud Dam downstream to the confluence of Ladybug Creek: two-period season — 2 trout with artificial lures only (Sat. preceding Memorial Day–Sep. 30); 0 trout catch-and-release with artificial lures and barbless hooks (Oct. 1–Fri. preceding Memorial Day).
groups.verbatimText: McCloud River from McCloud Dam downstream to confluence of Ladybug Creek. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only Artificial lures may be used. 2 trout. Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout
